title: Verify milestone B: Mobile-First Responsive Design

tasks.summary: Responsive layout with 3 breakpoints. Desktop sidebar, tablet right overlay, mobile bottom drawer. Toggle button, backdrop, matchMedia listener. 57 tests pass.
Created TouchHandler with pinch-to-zoom, single-finger pan, double-tap reset. Wired into EventBindings and main.ts. 57 tests pass.
WCAG-compliant touch targets (44px), full-width buttons on mobile (48px), enlarged slider thumbs, drag handle for bottom drawer, CSS grid fluid layout, increased font sizes.
Added getOptimalResolution() with devicePixelRatio capped at 2x, getMobileMaxIterations() that halves iterations on mobile. Updated resize handler. 57 tests pass.

inputs.verifyCommand: npm run type-check && npm test && npm run build
